column1: # Registry of kgmicrobe.* placeholder CURIEs that stand in for proposed (not yet minted)
# METPO terms in transform output.
# POLICY: Until a METPO term is officially minted in the upstream
# berkeleybop/metpo ontology release, KG-Microbe transforms MUST NOT emit the
# proposed METPO ID. Use a kgmicrobe.<sub>:<local_id> CURIE here instead. Once
# the term is published in METPO, swap this row's transform_object_id back to
# the METPO ID and mark status=accepted.
# kgmicrobe.* sub-prefixes in use (see kg_microbe/transform_utils/custom_curies.yaml
# for the per-CURIE label/category definitions consumed by transforms):
#   kgmicrobe.activity:* — molecular activities not yet in GO/EC/METPO
#   kgmicrobe.trait:*    — phenotypic qualities not yet in METPO
#   kgmicrobe.compound:* — chemical entities not yet in CHEBI
#   kgmicrobe.pathway:*  — biological processes not yet in GO/METPO
# Columns:
#   kgmicrobe_curie        — placeholder CURIE actually emitted by the transform
#   label                  — human-readable label
#   biolink_category       — biolink category emitted on the node
#   proposed_metpo_id      — METPO ID this placeholder will swap to (mappings/metpo_proposal_*.tsv)
#   proposed_metpo_label   — label of the proposed METPO term
#   used_by                — transform/mapping file that emits this CURIE
#   status                 — placeholder | proposal_filed | accepted
#   notes                  — context, citation, swap instructions
kgmicrobe_curie
kgmicrobe.activity:coagulase_activity
column8: 1.49M observations in metatraits; bacterial coagulase test; no public GO/EC term covers the bacterial coagulase phenotype directly. Swap to METPO:1007089 once berkeleybop/metpo accepts the proposal in mappings/metpo_proposal_categorical.tsv.
